items.title: Mini-R1: Reproduce Deepseek R1 „aha moment“ a RL tutorial
items.content: <article>Reproduce Deepseek R1 „aha moment“ and train an open model using reinforcement learning trying to teach it self-verification and search abilities all on its own to solve the Countdown Game.</article>

items.title: How to align open LLMs in 2025 with DPO and and synthetic data
items.content: <article>Learn how to align LLMs using Hugging Face TRL and RLHF through Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) and on-policy synthetic data.</article>

items.title: Bite: How Deepseek R1 was trained
items.content: <article>5 Minute Read on how Deepseek R1 was trained using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and RL-focused multi-stage training approach.</article>
